name: Three assertion-free unmount race-condition tests (use-speech-recognition)
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-05] three 'unmount race' tests end with '// No crash = success' and zero expect(); the mountedRef guard has no verification. Fix: assert state unchanged after post-unmount events.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: three useSpeechRecognition unmount-race tests end with no meaningful expect(), so mountedRef guard regressions can pass as long as the test does not throw. Variants: slow module resolving after unmount during startListening; result event after unmount; error event after unmount. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/hooks/use-speech-recognition.test.ts asserts post-unmount events do not mutate observable state and/or listener side effects; the three cases fail when mountedRef guards are removed and pass after.
